p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 pass_to_pass repo CI tests: (1) test_readme_prettier - checks README.md formatting with Prettier 3.8.1, (2) test_python_lint - checks tools/cross/*.py with ruff. CI commands discovered: justfile has lint target (python3 tools/cross/format.py), eslint for JS/TS (disabled due to complexity), prettier for markdown, ruff for Python. Tests verified passing on base commit.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed. Fixed rubric in eval_manifest.yaml: removed redundant rule that was incorrectly checking AGENTS.md (convention source) instead of README.md (actual changed file). The fail_to_pass test test_readme_correct_target already verifies the README uses correct Bazel target with @ suffix.
